x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CSM KB articles are the primary source for Now Assist CSM AI Search and case deflection.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create KB articles covering top customer inquiry categories. Target: 50+ published active articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search indexes all accessible KBs — focus on quality and coverage over KB naming conventions.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[CSM KB articles are the primary source for Now Assist CSM AI Search and case deflection.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>CSM Knowledge Base Coverage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check all published active KB articles — Now Assist CSM AI Search
    // indexes across all accessible KBs regardless of KB name
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    ga.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active KB articles';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published KB articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search has sufficient content for customer-facing self-service deflection.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles (target: 50+). Now Assist CSM AI Search coverage will be limited — expand KB content for key customer inquiry categories.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles. Insufficient KB content for meaningful Now Assist CSM AI Search and self-service deflection.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CSM</module>
<number>CHK0006042</number>
<order>50</order>
<remediation_guidance>Create KB articles covering top customer inquiry categories. Target: 50+ published active articles. Now Assist CSM AI Search indexes all accessible KBs — focus on quality and coverage over KB naming conventions.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8c</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
